title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Verizon Logistics Ltd
body: "Application number 5144  Applicant Verizon Trademark Services LLC objected to the name used by Verizon Logistics Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 28 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Verizon Logistics Ltd is changed to 15857299, Ltd. "
